title: Sunbathing Godrays
description: Adds godrays to Minecraft! requires polytone
body:
<center>

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2d7aebc96afc3c82ce9aa190544dd34c80add9.png)


<hr style="border:2px solid gray">

Sunbathing is a simple pack that adds sun and moon godrays.
These effects are simple screen space godrays and work through vanilla post shaders thanks to [polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone).

‎

![Showcase image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdbdaec5395fab2d767136f0a8a3af8d854ecd2b.png)


Pack is a proof of concept for what you can do with polytone post shaders

</center>
